meta.question: From which external documents are the TMT requirements imported?
meta.finalAnswer:
The TMT requirements are imported from **IBM DOORS** (Dynamic Object-Oriented Requirements System). 

The model contains a package named "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" which serves as the main container for requirements imported from this external document management system. Additionally, there is another package "03b OLD: proposed requirements (to be replaced with DOORS imported ones)" indicating an ongoing migration to DOORS-imported requirements.

The requirements are organized in a hierarchical structure under the "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" package, with sub-packages for different document types such as:
- ORD (Observatory Requirements Document)
- DRD APS (Design Requirements Document for APS)
- OAD (Observatory Architecture Document)
- SRD (Science Requirements Document)
- OPSRD (Operations Science Requirements Document)

request.query:
BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?elem ?type ?name WHERE {
  ?elem vocab:NamedElement_name ?name . 
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?name)), LCASE("TMT"))) 
  ?elem rdf:type ?type .
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT ?prop (COUNT(*) as ?count) WHERE {
  ?elem rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?elem ?prop ?value .
} 
GROUP BY ?prop 
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?supplierType ?supplierName WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_supplierDependency ?dep .
  ?dep vocab:Dependency_supplier ?supplier .
  ?supplier rdf:type ?supplierType .
  OPTIONAL { ?supplier vocab:NamedElement_name ?supplierName }
  FILTER(?supplierType != vocab:tmt%20requirement)
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?pkg ?pkgName WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_namespace ?pkg .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?pkgName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?pkgName)), LCASE("import")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?pkgName)), LCASE("door")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?parentPkgName WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_namespace ?pkg .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_owner ?parentPkg .
  OPTIONAL { ?parentPkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentPkgName }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?parentPkgName)), LCASE("door")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?parentPkgName)), LCASE("import")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?docName WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_namespace ?pkg .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_owner* ?parentPkg .
  ?parentPkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?docName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?docName)), LCASE("door")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?docName)), LCASE("import")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?topPkg ?topPkgName WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_namespace ?pkg .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_owner* ?topPkg .
  ?topPkg vocab:Element_owner ?rootPkg .
  OPTIONAL { ?topPkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?topPkgName }
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?topPkgName)), LCASE("door")) || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?topPkgName)), LCASE("import")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?topPkg ?topPkgName WHERE {
  ?req rdf:type vocab:tmt%20requirement .
  ?req vocab:NamedElement_namespace ?pkg .
  ?pkg vocab:Element_owner* ?topPkg .
  ?topPkg vocab:Element_owner ?rootPkg .
  OPTIONAL { ?topPkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?topPkgName }
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?pkgName WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?pkgName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?pkgName)), LCASE("door")))
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?doc ?docName WHERE {
  ?doc rdf:type vocab:document .
  ?doc vocab:NamedElement_name ?docName .
}
LIMIT 50

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?pkg ?pkgName ?parentName WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?pkgName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?pkgName)), LCASE("door")))
  ?pkg vocab:Element_owner ?parent .
  OPTIONAL { ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName }
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?pkg ?pkgName ?parent ?parentName WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?pkgName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?pkgName)), LCASE("door")))
  ?pkg vocab:Element_owner ?parent .
  OPTIONAL { ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName }
}
LIMIT 25

BASE <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/>
PREFIX vocab: <http://api.koneksys.com/cameo/vocab/>
PREFIX rdf:   <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?pkgName ?parentName WHERE {
  ?pkg rdf:type vocab:package .
  ?pkg vocab:NamedElement_name ?pkgName .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?pkgName)), LCASE("door")))
  ?pkg vocab:Element_owner ?parent .
  OPTIONAL { ?parent vocab:NamedElement_name ?parentName }
}
LIMIT 25

request.reason: The query results show that TMT requirements are organized in packages with names containing "DOORS" and "imported". The main package is "TMT Requirements imported from DOORS" which contains requirements imported from IBM DOORS. The model structure shows requirements are organized under this package hierarchy, indicating DOORS is the external document management system from which requirements are imported.
